title: Nano-DESI Mass Spectrometry Imaging kidney characterization pipeline for tissues collected by Vanderbilt University
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"5btej","text":"Our goal is to map the biological tissues with Nano-DESI Mass Spectrometry Imaging and build an atlas of human kidney.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3t1qk","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5fjna","text":"Scope: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2j94g","text":"Provide an overview of the sample preparation steps used by the Vanderbilt Tissue Mapping Center and Nano-DESI MSI workflow used by Julia Laskin's group as part of the Human Biomolecular Atlas Program (HuBMAP, NIH Common Fund).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Collection of post-surgical tissue by Vanderbilt. Collection: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7gehjte
Stabilize and freeze tissues by Vanderbilt Freezing Tissue: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.6wghfbw
Intial Rapid Pathology Assessment of Kidney Tissue by Vanderbilt. Staining: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.4qngvve Assessment: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.9dph25n

Cryosection tissues into micrometer thick sections, alternating between thaw mounting onto indium tin-oxide and positively charged glass slides (proceed to step 4), or collecting several tissue sections within an microcentrifuge tube for proteomics analysis by Vanderbilt. Cryosectioning: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7ethjen
Perform autofluorescence microscopy on all tissue sections before IMS (step 5) by Vanderbilt. Autofluorescence: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.7e3hjgn
Perform high resolution IMS lipidomics and metabolomics analysis of tissue sections. IMS: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bmwnk7de
Delipid the tissue section. Sample preparation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bmw6k7he
Perform high resolution IMS proteomics analysis of tissue sections. IMS: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bm2nk8de
Annotation of Lipids from IMS Data Annotation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bm2qk8dw
Annotation of proteins from IMS data. Annotation: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bm2rk8d6
Match the autofluorescence images from IMS sections with the ion images to visualize the correlation between molecules distribution and biological pathology.
Nano-DESI imaging mass spectrometry data processing. Data processing: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bm2sk8ee
creator: yang1832
